meaning: 波斯尼亚[南斯拉夫中西部一地区]
examples: Bosnia is shut off from the Adriatic by the mountains.
Croatian army troops retreated from northern Bosnia and the area fell to the Serbs.
The government insisted that troops would not become embroiled in battles in Bosnia.
And both the United States and Europe have real and important strategic interests in Bosnia.
Begovic grew up in Germany and Canada after his family fled Bosnia during the war.
